Photostatic copy of newspaper clipping appearing in the Knoxville News-Sentinel concerning these "flying saucers." KNOXVILLE Wewsesry {NEL JULY 19L,7 ae _ TR. PRESLEY' ad snapped several pictures of his family and his house a' 28 Illinois Avenue, Oak Ridge, the other after- 4 noon and, noticing he had one film 'left om the roll, he tu | and snapped it for a picture of the mountain. He had the roll developed, anc look what he got on that las' shot! Now don't start trying t explain it off. Just go ahead anc say what it looks like. Sure Sure. You're right. It is a Flying Saucer. A lot of folks have reported seeing the things. This. however, is the first time that one has ever been photographed over Oak Ridge. Mr. Presley says this picture has all of Oak Ridge talking.
